{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Seat of the Accused
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Seat of the Accused]] is surrounded by a cage.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Suriel]] transported herself to the [[Seat of the Accused]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
